Get started
Home Career

Career

Join a team where creativity, innovation, and growth come together. At ENX, you’ll contribute to global projects, expand your skills, and build a career that truly matters.

View Open Roles

LIFE AT ENX

A Culture Built for Growth & Collaboration

At ENX, we believe great work happens when talented people feel empowered, supported, and inspired. Our culture blends creativity, transparency, and continuous learning—giving every team member the freedom to experiment, contribute ideas, and grow into their best professional self.

  • People-first environment with open communication
  • Fleet & Asset Monitoring
  • Operational Alerts & Exception Handling
Improve Logistics Visibility

OUR BENEFITS

Support That Helps You Thrive

ENX provides a strong balance of professional growth, personal well-being, and long-term career support. Every benefit is designed to help you stay motivated, healthy, and empowered in your journey.

Competitive Salary

Fair, industry-aligned pay structures with regular performance-based evaluations and growth opportunities.

Flexible Work Environment

Remote-friendly options and balanced schedules that help you maintain productivity without sacrificing personal life.

Learning & Certification Support

Sponsored courses, skill programs, and guided mentorship to help you grow into a stronger, future-ready professional.

Wellness & Health Support

Wellness-driven culture, mental health days, and initiatives focused on maintaining a positive work-life balance.

Paid Leaves & Holidays

Generous time-off policies, festival breaks, and leaves that help you recharge and return with renewed focus.

Fast Career Advancement

Clear growth paths, leadership opportunities, and recognition for impactful contributions.

CAREERS

Hiring Process Overview

Explore Services

01

Apply & Profile Review

Our hiring team reviews your resume, portfolio, and experience to understand your strengths and alignment with the role. We focus on skill relevance, growth potential, and how well you match ENX’s work culture before moving you to the next stage.

02

Introductory Call

A short, friendly call where we discuss your background, interests, and expectations. This step helps both sides ensure the role fits your goals and gives you a quick overview of how ENX works, collaborates, and supports its talent.

03

Skill Evaluation

You’ll complete a small task or join a technical discussion designed to reflect real project scenarios. This helps us assess your problem-solving, creativity, and quality of work—while giving you a preview of the type of challenges you’ll handle at ENX.

04

Final Interview & Offer

A final interview with leadership to evaluate culture fit, communication, and long-term alignment. If everything matches, you receive a formal offer and onboarding details to begin your journey with ENX smoothly.

Explore Services

OPEN POSITIONS

Find the Role That Fits Your Future

Explore opportunities designed for ambitious professionals. Find the role that matches your skills, fuels your growth, and lets you contribute to ENX’s global impact.

Data Integration Specialist

You will lead end-to-end design initiatives, shaping product experiences from concept to final delivery. This role requires strong visual skills, user-centric thinking, and the ability to collaborate closely with developers, strategists, and stakeholders.

Remote / Hybrid
Full-time
Frontend Developer (React / Next.js)

Work with modern frameworks to build fast, responsive, and scalable digital interfaces. You’ll translate UI/UX designs into pixel-perfect components, optimize performance, and maintain clean coding standards.

Remote
Full-time
Digital Strategist

You will define digital roadmaps, drive data-backed decision-making, and align business goals with the right solutions. Your role includes deep research, competitor analysis, audience insights, performance tracking, and strategic planning.

On-Site / Remote
Full-time
Project Manager

Create structured, research-driven content that communicates complex technical and business concepts in a clear, engaging manner. You’ll work on insights, blogs, case studies, landing pages, and thought-leadership content.

Remote
Full-Time / Contract

APPLY NOW

Start Your Journey With ENX

Submit your application and take the next step toward joining a team that values creativity, ownership, and continuous growth. We review every profile carefully to find individuals who align with our mission and passion for building impactful digital solutions.

Frontend Developer
Digital Strategist
Project Manager
